modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need additional storage for South Dakota Data Store allocation.

full_description_text:  
The user is running out of space on their SDDS Sharing Tier Allocation. They mentioned that their SDDS Archive Tier is taking up too much space. They're looking for a way to add more storage to their South Dakota Data Store.
short_description: Need additional storage for South Dakota Data Store allocation.
description: The user is running out of space on their SDDS Sharing Tier Allocation. They mentioned that their SDDS Archive Tier is taking up too much space. They're looking for a way to add more storage to their South Dakota Data Store.
